Class PlasmaTower

java.lang.Object
tower.Tower
tower.AOETower
tower.PlasmaTower
public class PlasmaTower extends AOETower
An elite fusion tower that combines Area-of-Effect (AoE) capabilities with high-frequency attacks. * The PlasmaTower is the advanced result of merging a Gas Tower and a Zap Tower. By inheriting the wide-area damage of the Gas element and the rapid firing rate of the Zap element, this tower functions as a high-DPS "energy pulse" generator. It deals consistent, rapid damage to all enemies within its immediate vicinity, making it exceptionally effective against dense swarms.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    PlasmaTower(double x, double y)
    Constructs a PlasmaTower with high-performance combat statistics: - Range: 75 units (Focused AoE radius) - Cooldown: 0.7 seconds (Very fast for an AoE tower) - Damage: 10 per energy pulse

  • Constructor Details

    • PlasmaTower

      public PlasmaTower(double x, double y)
      Constructs a PlasmaTower with high-performance combat statistics: - Range: 75 units (Focused AoE radius) - Cooldown: 0.7 seconds (Very fast for an AoE tower) - Damage: 10 per energy pulse
      Parameters:
      x - Horizontal position on the game map.
      y - Vertical position on the game map.

  • Method Details

    • drawGas

      public void drawGas(javafx.scene.canvas.GraphicsContext gc)
      Renders a specialized "Plasma Pulse" visual effect. * This override replaces the standard gas aesthetic with a vibrant purple and magenta color scheme (RGB: 0.7, 0.2, 1.0) to represent high-energy ionized gas. The pulse expands and fades rapidly, reflecting the tower's high attack speed.
      Overrides:
      drawGas in class AOETower
      Parameters:
      gc - The GraphicsContext used for drawing on the game canvas.
